why_level_2.optimized_beyond_basic: Four JSON workflows use sequential, ThreadPoolExecutor parallel, and data-driven conditional modes.
why_level_2.edge_cases: Unknown workflows/actions/roles, missing case IDs, parallel failures, output-key conflicts, missing condition fields, and step failures are explicit.
why_level_2.deeper_analysis: Each run records node, Agent role, mode, status, elapsed time, input keys, output, branch decision, and final context.

why_level_2.optimized_beyond_basic: Offline local-HTML ingestion extracts text, image references, and tables into one searchable index with modality-aware scoring.
why_level_2.edge_cases: Empty queries, no-hit retrieval, modality filtering, missing local evidence, and deterministic ranking are covered.
why_level_2.deeper_analysis: The evaluation reports modality counts (75/277/277 after restoring the full local NPC dataset), evidence modalities per query, and a 20-question result set.

rubric_alignment: Two Lv.2 modules satisfy the required total difficulty of at least 4.
